The resource Questionnaire/Questionnaire-health-declaration could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The definition for the element 'Questionnaire.versionAlgorithm[x]' binds to the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/version-algorithm' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental

The definition for the element 'Questionnaire.subjectType' binds to the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/resource-types|5.0.0' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
The definition for the element 'Questionnaire.jurisdiction' binds to the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/jurisdiction' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
